---
title: Code Annotations (Skylighting)
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
    code-annotations: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        -
          - "quarto-circled-number"
          - "quarto-annotation-item"
          - "annotations:"
        - []
---

```python
x = 1  # <1>
y = 2
z = x + y  # <2>
```

1. Assign x.
2. Compute sum.
